channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Molokhia cigarettes: Gaza’s toxic alternative to tobacco
item.description: Smokers in Gaza turn to toxic molokhia nicotine cigarettes as tobacco prices surge, causing serious health risks.

item.title: Doctors Without Borders investigation finds exploitation by staff in Chad
item.description: The organisation employs tens of thousands of workers, local and foreign, to respond to crises across several countries.

item.title: FIFA World Cup Day 3: Brazil vs Morocco prediction, schedule, what to know
item.description: Brazil face Morocco as World Cup Day three brings predictions, key fixtures and other headlines.

item.title: Topuria shoves Gaethje by Lincoln Memorial ahead of White House UFC event
item.description: UFC Freedom 250 will proceed after ⁠a federal judge denies a legal challenge to the event on Friday.

item.title: Separated by the Gaza war, a Palestinian yearns to see his family again
item.description: Shady al-Areer, 38, was smuggled from Israel into the occupied West Bank after October 7, 2023. This is his story.

item.title: England training equipment stolen ahead of squad’s arrival in Kansas City
item.description: Local police say an investigation is under way over the possible theft of equipment which was arriving in Kansas City.

item.title: US fans celebrate victory over Paraguay in World Cup opener
item.description: US fans celebrate victory over Paraguay in World Cup opener

item.title: Lebanon war victims among 117M people displaced worldwide
item.description: A new UNHCR report reveals that 117.8 million people worldwide were forcibly displaced by the end of 2025.

item.title: One killed as Israel hits south Lebanon, issues forced displacement orders
item.description: The Israeli military has ordered residents of 20 Lebanese towns and villages to leave their homes immediately.

item.title: Trump seeks ‘off-ramp’ from war in ‘Iran deal’
item.description: As reports emerge of a possible US-Iran agreement, President Donald Trump is looking for an ‘off-ramp’ from Iran war.

item.title: Brazil vs Morocco World Cup team news: Neymar, start time and how to watch
item.description: Record five-time world champions Brazil open their 2026 campaign against African heavyweights Morocco on Saturday.

item.title: Trump says US strike killed Tren de Aragua gang boss with Venezuelan help
item.description: Gang leader Flores had controlled the vast criminal syndicate from Venezuela for years.

item.title: ‘A dream come true’: Fans revel as US win World Cup opener on home soil
item.description: Dominating 4-1 victory adds to joy of Team USA fans relishing the opportunity to see football on the brightest stage.

item.title: Trump claims US kills Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua gang leader
item.description: Trump claims US kills Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua gang leader

item.title: USA’s Pulisic shrugs off injury scare after 4-1 World Cup win over Paraguay
item.description: The AC Milan forward is the USA's talisman, and his form will be pivotal to the team's odds of a deep run.

item.title: Older runners defy age in Kenya’s central highlands
item.description: Members of a self-funded athletics club in Meru are proving that competition does not end with age.

item.title: UK court jails Palestine Action activists on ‘terrorism’ charges
item.description: UK court has sentenced four pro-Palestine activists to jail for a raid on an Israeli arms factory near Bristol in 2024.

item.title: Canada World Cup opener splits Bosnian fans among two ‘home nations’
item.description: Thousands of Bosnia fans turned Toronto blue as they marched to the chants of 'Free Palestine' in Toronto.

item.title: Canada and Bosnia fight out historic World Cup opener
item.description: Bosnia and Herzegovina and Canada have fought out a 1–1 draw in their World Cup opening match.

item.title: USA hit Paraguay for four in dream start to their World Cup campaign
item.description: USA beat Paraguay 4-1 in Los Angeles as each of the three World Cup cohosts have now staged a game in 2026 edition.

item.title: World Cup kicks off in US as Katy Perry, Future headline opening ceremony
item.description: Tom Cruise, David Beckham, Halle Berry among celebrities in attendance at Hollywood-style opening ceremony.

item.title: Thomas Partey denied entry into Canada, will miss Ghana’s World Cup opener
item.description: Partey's visa was denied due to the multiple charges of rape he faces in the United Kingdom.

item.title: Iran war live: US, Iran signal deal within reach; Israel bombs Lebanon
item.description: Four activists from Palestine Action jailed by a British court over protest raid on Israeli arms firm in UK.

item.title: Palestine football chief says he wasn’t granted US visa to attend World Cup
item.description: Jibril Rajoub remains in Mexico awaiting a US visa to attend the World Cup 2026.

item.title: Bosnia, Canada share points in hard-fought draw at World Cup
item.description: Cyle Larin's equaliser gives Canada first World Cup points after Jovo Lukic put Bosnia in the lead in the first half.
